string 2: We need to hurry to see Dr. Simmons.
I see lights!
Rebellion Village is just up ahead. Let's hurry on.

The gate to Central Town is just ahead. Sorry, but
I can't let you through without permission.

The gate to Central Town is just ahead. Sorry, but
I can't let you through without permission.

There's nothing to do here right now.
Let's prioritize the mission.
Going back to Shinjuku?
Yes, let's head to Shinjuku.
{end}Not right now.
Ready to go to the lab?
{next}Yes, let's head to the lab.
{end}Not yet.

We're counting on you. Please... stop my former colleagues
from making a terrible mistake.
Do you wish to visit Chronomon?

It's been years since the town got taken over. Will we ever 
be able to go back?

You're the one who made all that fuss about seeing Lord
Merukimon before, right?

If you're looking for Lord Merukimon, he's just further ahead.
You should go see him.
Hey! It's our hero from Central Tower! Thanks again for your help!

But thinking about that Central Tower... Man, it gets me even
now!

We have received word from Merukimon's subordinate. It
arrived only moments ago.

Merukimon's body can hold out no longer. That fact has put
urgency behind his decision.

I tried my best to talk Merukimon out of it, but to no
avail...

If I had received word even one day earlier, there might
have been some way to prolong things—
...What? You received a half-day grace period...?

How did you accomplish that? Merukimon would not listen to
a word of my pleas to stop.

With an extra half a day... we just might be able to try a
new medicine...

If we can only remedy the poison, it will remove
Merukimon's reason for rashly hurrying into a decision.

In order to make this antidote... we will need the fruit of
Karpos Hulē.

I heard you were unable to obtain any previously, but I ask
that you go and try again.
Half a day is not much time... so please hurry.

I wonder what's become of Central Tower. I guess there's
no way to know, what with the town having become occupied...

Oh! Hey! You, there! Aren't ya that big rookie
from way back when?!

I can't believe I'd run into ya like this! What luck!
Hey, what've ya been up to all this time?!
Wait! Don't bother telling me. I bet I already know!

Well, things here are terrible! It's been bad ever since
the town was taken over by the Titans.

But never mind that. You're looking to meet with Lord
Merukimon, right? Well, you're in luck! He's inside.

I fled here for my life, but now the town's been occupied.
Will I ever see Central Tower again?
What?! It... It's you! So, you made it!
Thanks so much for your help back in the Factorial Area!
But... these days, that area isn't the way it used to be.

I don't really know how to put it, but... right now, the
two of us can hardly stand the place.

It's not as dangerous as the other areas, so it's maybe not
such a bad place to live, but, still...

Huh?! I remember you! You helped us out that one time,
right?

What? The Factorial Area? Ugh...! I'm so ashamed of what 
it's like now, I can't stand to go there anymore!
But... if you're going, you'd better bring a ton of YEN.
As for the two of us, we'll probably never go back.

It is you! That human from before!
Have you been keeping safe?

I am sure things have been rough for you, too.
As for us, well... the Titans have taken Central Town!

There were countless injured, and some were
left behind in the town...

I worry for their safety, but it is all we can do right now
to keep our own heads above water.

Curse those yellow Titan varmints...! My partner deserved
better! By gum, one of these days, I'll pay 'em back good!

Those Titans... So much stronger than we expected... Oh, it
fills my heart with such regret!
Man... I wanna put on a show like I used to back in town.

Ooh, that hurts... Are you... refugees, too? Where did you
come from?

I'm from the Gear Forest, but... things got so bad there I
had to flee.

The Digimon here are taking care of me. I couldn't be more
grateful to meet such a hospitable bunch.

*sigh* I ran and ran out o' sheer desperation until I found
myself 'ere.

Blimey, 'ow I long for the ole waters o' Abyss Beach. But
now... *sigh*

I only came to escape misfortune, but... it ain't half bad
here, ya know? Maybe I'll settle down.

Not all the residents of Central Town made it out. I hope
the ones who got left behind are okay...
Hey, listen up! There's nothing to be afraid of! Let's gooooo!

I'm focusing my mind in preparation for combat.
Please don't talk to me.

All right! That's what I'm talking about!
Those overgrown punks better watch themselves!

We're going to crush them! We're going to take them down!
We'll reclaim the town and Central Tower both!
Yaaaaah! Watch out, Titans! This time, you're going down!

Grr... Those wretched Titans! Last time, they caught us
off guard, but that will not happen again.

Those who traveled to different places to train have been
coming back one after another.
The time has come for Lord Merukimon to make a decision.

So, it's that time at last... Good thing, too. I've got to
reopen that tavern soon, or I could lose my touch.

Yeehaw! Our forces have all banded together!
Those yellow-bellied Titans better watch out!

Yaaah! Thanks, everyone! I'm going, too! Let's give those
Titans some payback!

Yes! I just know you can do it! Get out there and take down
those Titans! I'll be cheering you on the whole time!

I may still be hurting, but with everyone coming together
like this, I'm ready to get out there myself!

Hmph. These fools from town have always been lackadaisical,
but it looks like they finally got their acts together.

Still, they lack the real strength to succeed. I suppose
I'll just have to join them myself and give them a hand...

That weapon's been activated, and it looks like it's
heading straight for the Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building.

There's not a shred of beauty in that thing. I refuse to
accept that such a monstrosity should have ever been made.

It's the very reason I left the organization, because it
agreed to make such a thing.
We have to stop it. There's not a moment to lose.
So, the weapon's been activated...

Then, there's no time to spare. We need to get there
as soon as we can.
This gate that connects our world to that of the Digimon...
...is most intriguing.

Fundamentally, it seems like it would best be left closed.
That's how the worlds have stayed in balance all this time.

But at some point, it seems to have been jammed open. At 
the very least, I'm confident this gate was never here before.

Perhaps something happened to the being who was
meant to watch over the gate.
Wait. Isn't that Junomon's job?
I wonder how all the other Digimon are doing...
We should go check up on them!

I'll contact you by Digiline if I need to get in touch.
Let's exchange IDs.

The gate to the world of Digimon... Ever since that
thing showed up, it's been one crazy incident after another.

Something might have happened to the Digimon who was meant
to watch over it.
Is it just me, or does something seem really off?
Everyone seems on edge... They're all worked up.
It sounds like they're gonna go fight the Titans...
Little Bearmon...? Oh, I know who ya mean.

Head to the Shinjuku Underground Arena and I'm sure
you'll find who you're looking for.

But if ya do plan on going there, ya better watch yerselves. 
It's like a haven for anti-Merukimon types.

Despite all that's happened, Merukimon still isn't looking for all-out war.
As such, some of the more hawkish ones have already left.
They're the ones who run the Shinjuku Underground Arena.

They say they're toughening themselves up for war with the
Titans, but I think they're just venting their pent-up frustration.

Recently, it seems some humans are teaming up with
certain underworld types and are letting in spectators.

Maybe it's an attempt to gain money and influence. They're 
teaming up with humanity's villains to defeat the Titans.

Little Bearmon is one of the founding members of the
Shinjuku Underground Arena...
If ya go there, maybe ya can meet up.

If you plan on going to Shinjuku, you should be careful. 
There's been a bit of a commotion there recently.

I think you should talk to Pegasusmon over there. I hear it flies 
over Shinjuku sometimes.

If you plan on going to Shinjuku, you should be careful. There's 
been a bit of a commotion there recently.

I think you should talk to Pegasusmon over there. I heard he 
has recently seen the disturbance in Shinjuku for himself.
Our forces may have come together, but... I'm still nervous...

Hey! We don't need that kind of negative talk! This is do
or die! You got that?!
All right, all right! I get it! Just calm down!
We have to find better fighters!
The Titans are strong... We need to be thoroughly prepared!
Powerful warriors... Guidance... Now is the time to awaken...

Maybe this is our chance to repay you for all you've
done for us.

Yes, I was thinking that as well. When people do nice
things for you, it's important to help them out, too!

Hehe... It seems the time has come to put my glorious
skills on full display!
Hehehehe! Prepare to be dazzled!
Oh, it's you! Almost everyone has moved.
That's thanks to you, too. I can't thank you enough!

This leads to the lab. There's no telling what could be
waiting up ahead, so be ready for anything.
What do you think? Are you prepared?
{next}[Head to the lab.]
{end}[Hold off.]

Asuna probably knows more about the way from here.
Let's leave it to her to guide us.

Hey there! Got some real good info for ya! I'll even let
ya have it for free!

The town may have been taken over, but did ya know that my
buddy's been working on resistance in secret?

The little scamp's been quietly gathering information on
the enemy behind the scenes.

So if there's anything ya want to know about the Titans'
oppression, just ask my buddy!

See? Wasn't that some good info?! So now... I'm counting on
ya...!
Yo, yo! The time is now! The final battle's about to start!
Everyone who left is back, so...
See? I knew I was right to put my faith in you!
Prove me right! I'm counting on ya!

Ah! But don't get ahead of yerself! You've got to put in
the work!

Would they all just shut up? What's with the racket? How
am I supposed to get any sleep?!
Oh, there ya are! Dr. Simmons was looking for ya!

She's in the room Lord Merukimon was using.
Why don't ya go say hi?
You should head to the lab now.

I have bad news about Merukimon and the poison... Without
treatment, I am afraid Merukimon is not long for this world!

We will need the fruit of Karpos Hulē... although I heard
it was unobtainable previously...

I will go and look for it myself. Merukimon is in critical
condition, every second counts.
...I have a message for ya from GrapLeomon.
It says, "This problem is just between us brothers. Sorry."

Wait. Does that mean... GrapLeomon went on ahead without
us?!

The brothers are going to fight each other...? No! We can't
let that happen!
Let's go after GrapLeomon!
I guess GrapLeomon wants to do this alone...?
Youngest siblings are always trouble...
I just hope GrapLeomon doesn't do anything reckless.

Head to the Shinjuku Underground Arena and you'll find
Little Bearmon.
I can't guarantee it'll be easy, but good luck!
GrapLeomon looked really worried.

I'm not sure what's going on, but I'd say if you're going
after GrapLeomon, you'd better move fast.
Now, where could Little Bearmon be...?

Little Bearmon used to live in Central Town. Why not ask
a Digimon who might have known him from back then?
Let's see... What about that Chuumon over there?

Shinjuku Underground Arena? I can take you there,
but... Shinjuku is looking different from usual right now.

I heard someone attacked the Digimon District and ran to
the city. There's probably a lot of commotion. Still want to go?
Shall we head over to the Shinjuku Underground Arena?
{next}[Go to the Arena.]
{end}[Stay here.]
First, let's find Dr. Simmons. She should be in the hut next door.
Oh, hello...
Let's talk again later. You should go see Dr. Simmons for now.
Wait. Did you forget who I am?

I used to be BlackGatomon. We activated the electromagnetic
net generators together, remember?

From that day since, I've been working with this woman...
Asuna Shiroki. I guess you could call me her partner.
Wait. Did you forget who I am?

I used to be BlackGatomon. We activated the electromagnetic
net generators together, remember?

From that day since, I've been working with this woman...
Asuna Shiroki. I guess you could call me her partner.

I don't really get the complicated stuff but... no matter
what crisis unfolds, I will protect Asuna.

If she's protecting Dr. Simmons, then I'll protect them both.
I'll be right by her side until the very end.
So... don't worry about me, is all I can say.
Hey, you've got cards too, don't you? How about a game?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.

Not the time, huh? Well, come back when it IS the time,
and I'll be waiting for you.

That was a great match! You got me good, but I still had a
blast!

Things turned out well for me this time, but you're good at
this, a real force to be reckoned with.
Ready to head to the lab?
Yes.
{end}No.
Oh, it's you! I'm glad you're all okay!

Sorry, but there's something on my mind right now. Could
you give me some time?

You're the only ones I can count on, so while I hate to
make trouble for you, I really hope you can help.

All these mighty warriors... This is awful!
To have misjudged those Titans so terribly...

Master Monochromon! Are you okay?! I do not believe this!
After I Digivolved and everything!

Those blasted Titans! They'll pay for this! I will take
them down if it is the last thing I do! Just wait!
Ugh, my head... I had too much to drink...
Oh, Locomon, where did you go? I hope you're all right...

Hm? You're that human from way back when. You seem like
you're doing well.

You know, losing the tavern was a terrible blow... Isn't
there anything we can do?
Urgh... It... It hurts...

How could I have failed so terribly? I'll repay this
debt... I swear!
So... my apprentices arrived... while I was incapacitated?

Well... they've all... got so much promise. I'm sure...
they'll be fine...
Monodramon is short-tempered... and Guilmon is too proud...
If only they could overcome those faults...

But... they're still better than I am right now. Haha...
Urgh...

I miss the simple days of competing with my friends... It's
not fair! The Titans ruined everything! I'll make them pay!
Getting revenge on the Titans, are they...?

Having just lost a family member to those brutes, I can
understand where they're coming from...

...but I'll try to help talk the ones who aren't going back
to town out of it, too.
I'll leave the temple business to you.

Oh, it's you. The warriors have all gone off to prepare for
battle.

They each displayed a commendable resolve. It's made me
determined to outdo even their example!

Between you and me, Lord Merukimon's condition is
worsening.

I hate to keep asking for more from you, but could you
please hurry? You're our only hope!

The time has come at last! We will wipe away the shame
of our defeat!

It's time we faced those Titans in battle! I won't let a single
one of them escape!

There's been some disturbing activity at the lab.
Even I'm not sure what might happen there.

We'd better make sure we're ready for anything before we
head out.
So, the battle's going to start soon? I pray that it goes well!

Everyone's gotten so serious. It really feels like a battle's
about to break out.

I thought I heard some familiar voices... Have my
apprentices returned?

Start by going after Dianamon. Then maybe we can
learn the truth.

According to Dr. Kuga, Dianamon provided public safety
with Digimon to use in their experiments.

I'm not clear on the exact details. It sounds like you'll need
to head to the Cosmic Area where they say Dianamon is.

I hear Lady Dianamon is in the Cosmic Area.
Blimpmon can take you there.

But why would Lady Dianamon stoop to selling her own kind?
What in the world could have caused this?
If only Minervamon were here, the situation would be different...
The Cosmic Area is ruled over by Apollomon and Dianamon.

Each has their own realm within the Cosmic Area, with one
side that's hot and the other side that's cold.

But lately I hear they've been at each other's throats,
and neglecting their duties as rulers because of it.

So sometimes it gets way too hot or way too cold, and even
the local residents are on edge. You'd better take care.

Merukimon still needs to rest and recuperate, but his life
is no longer in danger. That is truly a relief.
We will prepare for war. I will see you in Central Town.

You need not fear for me. Please, go and see what state my
town is in.
Oh! Lord Merukimon! You've recovered! This is great news!
This is all thanks to you people, isn't it? You've saved us!
We'll be right behind you! Good luck out there!

The Gear Forest... That's over toward the sanctuary, right?
I'm concerned about what things may be like over there.
But I'd like you to search for this fruit of Karpos Hulē!
Please! All our hopes rest with you.

Ngh...! I see... So you were unable to find the fruit of
Karpos Hulē...
And yet the time for battle draws ever nearer!

Oh, Lord Merukimon! This is terrible!
What am I supposed to do?!
I am sorry to have worried you... I heard everything...
Oh, you need not worry... This is hardly enough to do me in.

I am more concerned that the Gear Forest may also be
suffering a Titan attack...

And so... I would ask... that you care for the Digimon
there as well...
I can see that you are concerned... but I am fine for now.
Thanks to your efforts, the village is now free from the Titans.

All may not be as it was, but I am certain more of our
allies will be amenable now.
I pray that this will lead to a ceasefire.

I wish for you all to keep an eye on what the humans are
up to...

I have heard that D-SAT has begun to make a move.
Speak to Dr. Simmons for more details.

I've heard from the local residents about your activities
in the Digital World.

It seems you've done more than I could've imagined.
I wish it was all detailed in a report for me to read through.

But, setting that aside, it's time we got moving.
The village chief wants to speak with all of you.

I spoke to Dr. Simmons when I heard public safety was
starting to make a move.
I'll be honest... The news isn't very good.

It'll take them some time to activate the weapon.
If we act now, we'll still have a chance to intervene.
Let's head out as soon as we're ready.

Well, well... It's been eight years. That's quite a long
time. I assume you got the details from Asuna?

Public safety changed after Captain Kuremi retired due to
injury. Seeing how low they've stooped makes me sick.

I... wanted to find a way to coexist with Digimon. And as I
got to know them, I learned of all you did eight years ago.

But then you suddenly disappeared. Many of the Digimon
were worried about what became of you, you know.
So, tell me. What have you been doing for the past eight years?

I see... You're telling me you traveled through time?
It sounds like something out of Agent Alpha...

Oh, yeah, you're right! There was a whole thing about the
mystery of time travel in the second half of the series!
But wait a sec...
{next}You know Agent Alpha?
{next}Do you watch a lot of anime?
{next}Was it on TV in your home country, too?

Of course. It's the single greatest piece of fiction ever!
All those gadgets in the show were works of pure art!

It was so popular in my home country they did a live-action
remake. Actually, I'll let you in on a little secret...

That suit Asuna is wearing is based on the outfit of a new
character they introduced for the remake!
D-Don't stare at me like that. It's embarrassing...

Huh. I used to watch Agent Alpha all the time, but I don't
remember there being any character who looked like that...

Well, the live-action remake wasn't very well received,
even though I love it to bits. But...

This couldn't be more perfect. The two of you look like
you're straight out of a scene from the original.

That's true... Your outfit does look a lot like the main
character's, {player}.

Agent Alpha was a hero. Sadly, with the way my old colleagues
have been acting, they can be called the exact opposite.

Apologies for the tangent, but allow me to give you my interpretation
of what happened to you over the past eight years.

I believe that the future actually splits into different paths.
Alternatively, you could say there are multiple worlds.

Take your traveling through time, for example. That act
alone may have created a new split, a new path for the world.

While we may be in a different world, the trajectory of
both worlds remains largely the same. As proof...

You said a war between Digimon brought about global
collapse, right? Well, that's happening right now, as we speak.

Ask the Digimon for more details. The village chief wanted
to meet with you anyway.

If Asuna says she will protect Dr. Simmons, then I will
do the same.
I want to help her fulfill her wishes as much as possible.

Because she is my partner... no, she is the first human
friend that I had ever made.
